mapper.select:
SELECT DATE(p.created_at) as date, SUM(p.amount) as amount, COUNT(*) as count FROM payment p
INNER JOIN parking_record pr ON p.parking_record_id = pr.id
WHERE p.created_at >= #{startDate} AND p.created_at <= #{endDate} AND p.status = 1
AND pr.parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
GROUP BY DATE(p.created_at) ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE(DATE_SUB(p.created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(p.created_at) DAY)) as date, SUM(p.amount) as amount, COUNT(*) as count FROM payment p
INNER JOIN parking_record pr ON p.parking_record_id = pr.id
WHERE p.created_at >= #{startDate} AND p.created_at <= #{endDate} AND p.status = 1
AND pr.parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
GROUP BY DATE(DATE_SUB(p.created_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(p.created_at) DAY)) ORDER BY date

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m-01') as date, SUM(p.amount) as amount, COUNT(*) as count FROM payment p
INNER JOIN parking_record pr ON p.parking_record_id = pr.id
WHERE p.created_at >= #{startDate} AND p.created_at <= #{endDate} AND p.status = 1
AND pr.parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(p.created_at, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY date

SELECT HOUR(p.created_at) as hour, COUNT(*) as count FROM payment p
INNER JOIN parking_record pr ON p.parking_record_id = pr.id
WHERE p.created_at >= #{startDate} AND p.created_at <= #{endDate} AND p.status = 1
AND pr.parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
GROUP BY HOUR(p.created_at) ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT p.payment_method as method, COUNT(*) as count FROM payment p
INNER JOIN parking_record pr ON p.parking_record_id = pr.id
WHERE p.created_at >= #{startDate} AND p.created_at <= #{endDate} AND p.status = 1
AND pr.parking_lot_id = #{parkingLotId}
GROUP BY p.payment_method ORDER BY count DESC
